response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Perfect phonetic match with the covers of the song 'きゅびずむ' (Cubism) by Ninomae Ina'nis and Anya Melfissa, as well as the surrounding comic strip voiceovers.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the reference JSON to structure the cover performance, then used manual transcription for the spoken comic strips and spoken interlude within the song.
3. Timing & Pacing: Carefully aligned timestamps with the spoken audio in the voice-acted comic panels, ensuring seamless visual mapping with English text bubbles and Japanese burnt-in text.

subtitles.original: これ、誰の写真なんですか？
subtitles.english: Who's this a picture of anyway?

subtitles.original: いま調べている事件の被害者だよ。
subtitles.english: The victim from a case I'm working.

subtitles.original: あっ、報酬はいつもの値段でいいよね？
subtitles.english: Anyway, you're charging the standard fee, right?

subtitles.original: 悪いけど今回はツケにしといて
subtitles.english: Sorry, but can you put it on my tab?

subtitles.original: でも前回もツケって言ってましたよね...
subtitles.english: But you put the last one on your tab too...

subtitles.original: じゃあイナは特別に...1回だけタダで依頼を受けてあげるから。
subtitles.english: Maybe we could do a trade then? I'll solve one case for you for free.

subtitles.original: それよりも...歌がいいな〜。
subtitles.english: Oooorrr... I'll trade you for a song~

subtitles.original: はい？
subtitles.english: Huh?

subtitles.original: だって！アーニャさん最近ずっと怖い顔してますよ。
subtitles.english: Come on! You've been so serious lately.

subtitles.original: たまには息抜きしないと。
subtitles.english: You gotta get loose sometimes.

subtitles.original: 私と1曲歌ってくれたら、絵は差し上げます。どうですか？
subtitles.english: So one song with me, and you get to keep the picture. That's the deal~

subtitles.original: そこまで言うなら...歌ってやるか！
subtitles.english: If that's what you want, then alright!

subtitles.original: 大きな白いキャンバスに 虚構のコラージュを貼るよ
subtitles.english: On a large white canvas, I'll paste a collage of fiction

subtitles.original: どこからでもキレイに映る 誇張された天使が居たよ
subtitles.english: An exaggerated angel was there, beautifully reflected from any angle

subtitles.original: まだ 人 歪んだ 正しくなくても見えた
subtitles.english: Still, the person is distorted; even if it wasn't correct, it was visible

subtitles.original: 生きるため立ち寄った美術館のセザンヌに
subtitles.english: In Cezanne, at the art museum I dropped by to survive

subtitles.original: なんもわかんないな
subtitles.english: I don't understand anything

subtitles.original: 私 知らずにいても描けた
subtitles.english: I could draw it even without knowing yet

subtitles.original: 赤 ずっと塗り込んだ
subtitles.english: I painted it red for a long time

subtitles.original: ばか きっとそうだった
subtitles.english: Fool, surely it was like that

subtitles.original: 一人 筆を掻いた
subtitles.english: I wielded the brush alone

subtitles.original: けど そこが良いな
subtitles.english: But I like it that way

subtitles.original: くだらない線だなぁ そのまま
subtitles.english: What a silly line, just like that

subtitles.original: 切って 貼って 変わって
subtitles.english: Cut it, paste it, change it

subtitles.original: 泣いて 見えた 青 青
subtitles.english: Crying, I saw blue, blue

subtitles.original: ララララララ 笑うように 浮いた 浮いた 泡
subtitles.english: La-la-la-la-la-la, floating, floating bubbles as if laughing

subtitles.original: ギュって 裂いて から
subtitles.english: After tearing it tightly

subtitles.original: ギュって 泣いた から
subtitles.english: Because I cried tightly

subtitles.original: 泣いて 泣いた から から
subtitles.english: Because I cried, cried...

subtitles.original: ララララララ 嘆く壁に 描いた パブロ ピカソ
subtitles.english: La-la-la-la-la-la, Pablo Picasso, painted on a lamenting wall

subtitles.original: なぜか私のことだなって眺めちゃったよ。
subtitles.english: For some reason, I stared at it thinking it was about me.

subtitles.original: これが欲しいなって感じたら...
subtitles.english: If I feel like I want this...

subtitles.original: お姉さんの絵を勝ち取る！なんてね♪
subtitles.english: I'll win over the lady's painting! Just kidding~

subtitles.original: ドッペルゲンガーがじっと見てたよ
subtitles.english: The doppelganger was staring intently.

subtitles.original: 二番 嘘を 重ねたら
subtitles.english: If I layer second lies,

subtitles.original: 本物の意味あるのかな
subtitles.english: Is there any real meaning to it?

subtitles.original: 私怨 ずっと 抱いたまま
subtitles.english: Still harboring personal grudges,

subtitles.original: 飾り落ちて床で死んでた
subtitles.english: The decorations fell and died on the floor.

subtitles.original: 血 青 ずっと 塗り込んだ
subtitles.english: Blood, blue, I kept painting it...

subtitles.original: やっぱ ずっと 良かった
subtitles.english: As expected, it was always good.

subtitles.original: 卑しい線だな 今も
subtitles.english: What a vulgar line, even now.

subtitles.original: 切って 貼って 変わって
subtitles.english: Cut it, paste it, change it

subtitles.original: 咲いて 散った 花 花
subtitles.english: The flowers that bloomed and scattered

subtitles.original: ララララララ 笑うように 見えた 見えた から
subtitles.english: La-la-la-la-la-la, because it looked like it was laughing

subtitles.original: ギュって 裂いた から
subtitles.english: Because I tore it tightly

subtitles.original: ギュって 泣いた から
subtitles.english: Because I cried tightly

subtitles.original: 泣いて 泣いた から から
subtitles.english: Because I cried, cried...

subtitles.original: ララララララ 嘆く壁に 描いた パブロ ピカソ
subtitles.english: La-la-la-la-la-la, Pablo Picasso, painted on a lamenting wall

subtitles.original: 私 嘘の ピカソ
subtitles.english: I am a fake Picasso

subtitles.original: やっと来た。
subtitles.english: Finally.

subtitles.original: こんな不気味な場所で待たせないでほしいんだけど。
subtitles.english: This is a creepy place to make someone wait.

subtitles.original: 現場を調べたらKFPの近くに寄るから、店の近くで待っててって言ったのに。
subtitles.english: I told you I'd come to the nearby KFP after investigating the crime scene.

subtitles.original: そんなの無理！
subtitles.english: Not a chance!

subtitles.original: アンタと話すだけでもイヤなのに、話してるところを人に見られたりしたらそれこそ最悪。
subtitles.english: It's bad enough I have to talk to you. I don't want others to be around to see it.

subtitles.original: そんなアンタが手を貸してくれるなんて意外だけどね。
subtitles.english: I'm surprised you're willing to cooperate in the first place.

subtitles.original: それは...例の殺人事件以降、いろいろ妙なことが起こってるの。
subtitles.english: Yeah, well, ever since the murder, weird things have been happening.

subtitles.original: アンタが解決してくれるなら、こうやって会うのもやむなしよ。
subtitles.english: I figure if you can help solve it, then it's worth the trouble of meeting with you.

subtitles.original: イヤだけど。
subtitles.english: Just barely.

subtitles.original: 妙なことが起こってる？
subtitles.english: What weirdness?

subtitles.original: 『人の形をした黒い影が見えた』って報告が、うちの従業員からちょくちょく出てるの。
subtitles.english: Some of my employees have been complaining about seeing a shadowy figure.

subtitles.original: 話によれば、最初は夢の中にそれが現れたんだけど、今は起きてる時も見ええるって――
subtitles.english: They say it started with bad dreams, but now some are seeing it even when they're—

subtitles.original: アーニャ！
subtitles.english: Anya!

subtitles.original: だ...大丈夫。それより...
subtitles.english: I'm... fine, don't worry about me.

subtitles.original: これ見て。
subtitles.english: Look at this.

subtitles.original: まったくもう、アンタはいつも大げさすぎ...ん？
subtitles.english: Hmph. 'Course. You're just always being overly dramatic... huh?

subtitles.original: おかしいな。現場の証拠品は警察が全部回収したはずなのに。
subtitles.english: Weird. I figured the cops would have already collected all the evidence.

subtitles.original: この近くに住んでるKFPの従業員で、被害者のことを知ってる者は？
subtitles.english: Did any of your employees who live nearby know the victim?

subtitles.original: いない。
subtitles.english: Nope.

subtitles.original: 分かった。新しい情報が入ったらまた教えて。
subtitles.english: Alright. Let me know if you hear anything else.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待った！
subtitles.english: Wait!

subtitles.original: それだけ？
subtitles.english: That's it?

subtitles.original: 私の時間を奪っておいてタダで帰るつもり？
subtitles.english: You're not even gonna compensate me for my time?

subtitles.original: 従業員のためかと思いきや、結局カネかい。
subtitles.english: I thought you were doing this to help your employees.

subtitles.original: タダ働きはしない主義なの。
subtitles.english: I'm still a businesswoman.

subtitles.original: いま持ち合わせがないんだけど、代わりに歌で支払うっていうのはどう？
subtitles.english: Well, I don't have any cash on me, but I can pay you in song.

subtitles.original: ウソでしょ？
subtitles.english: Seriously?

subtitles.original: 歌うの？アンタと？
subtitles.english: You think I'd want to sing? With you?

subtitles.original: イナは歌で喜んでくれたけどなー。
subtitles.english: Ina accepted payment in song.

subtitles.original: ただ、イナと歌うのは楽しいけど、
subtitles.english: But then, singing with her is fun.
